## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. (e.g. "It's frustrating when...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any screenshots, mockups, or additional context about the feature request here.
